overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through an urban park plaza at night. The character ascends steps toward a large illuminated equestrian statue, circles around it while observing the monument, and continues walking through the park surrounded by autumn trees and towering city buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban park plaza with central monument and steps

events.description: reaches the top of the steps and begins circling clockwise around the statue

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete steps toward the illuminated equestrian statue, then beginning to circle around the monument while looking up at it

notable_agents.action: standing near the steps observing the plaza
standing near the vintage street lamp on the right

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading up to the statue plaza
large illuminated monument of a figure on horseback atop a tall stone pedestal
decorative black metal fence surrounding the statue base with hedge inside
trees with red and orange autumn foliage surrounding the plaza
modern glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows forming the backdrop
green ornate lamp posts casting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks up concrete steps into an urban park plaza at night, approaching a grand illuminated equestrian statue surrounded by an iron fence and autumn trees. The camera follows from behind as he begins to circle the monument, with the glowing windows of tall office buildings visible in the background and a few pedestrians standing around the perimeter.

events.description: two pedestrians in dark jackets walk past the camera from right to left, temporarily blocking the view of Spider-Man

agents.ego_description: continuing to circle around the statue, observing the monument from different angles as the camera orbits

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera from right to left in the foreground, temporarily obscuring the view

entered.detail: concrete park bench visible on the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: As Spider-Man continues circling the statue, the camera orbits to show different sides of the monument against the night sky. The background shifts to reveal different angles of the surrounding skyscrapers. At around 20 seconds, two pedestrians walk past the camera in the foreground, temporarily blocking the view, while a stone bench becomes visible on the left side of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: park perimeter path moving away from the monument

events.description: moves away from the statue plaza toward the park edge with street lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking away from the statue toward the park perimeter, passing by benches and autumn trees with the city street visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks away from the statue plaza, moving along a path toward the park perimeter. The monument falls behind and out of view as the camera continues forward, passing stone benches and autumn trees. The scene transitions toward the edge of the park where distant street lights and the city street become visible ahead, with the tall buildings now centered in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an approach toward a grand monument and ends with a departure toward the city streets. It begins as Spider-Man ascends concrete steps into an urban park plaza at night, moving toward an illuminated equestrian statue framed by autumn trees and glowing office buildings. As he circles the monument, the camera orbits to reveal shifting angles of the surrounding skyscrapers, momentarily interrupted by pedestrians walking through the foreground near a stone bench. The scene then shifts as Spider-Man walks away from the plaza, leaving the statue behind while passing more benches and foliage. Finally, the camera moves toward the park perimeter, where the view opens up to reveal distant street lights and the towering city skyline centered in the background.
